_meta.title: Evolution Toolkit Config
_meta.purpose: Schema-only example for portable workspace and skill optimizer configuration
_meta.how_to_use: Copy to config.json, replace placeholder paths with real ones, and provide your own API key through env vars or workspace secrets.

customer-support.name: Customer Support Replies
customer-support.generatorPrompt: Write a customer support reply that follows the playbook exactly.

testCases.title: Refund still pending after 5 business days
testCases.context: The customer is frustrated but has not yet churned.

evalCriteria.name: clarity
evalCriteria.description: The reply is easy to understand and resolves the user's confusion.

evalCriteria.name: accuracy
evalCriteria.description: The reply does not invent policy or unsupported claims.

evalCriteria.name: tone
evalCriteria.description: The tone matches the brand and the situation.
